name: 張世豪
objective:
An embedded system is a computing system designed for a specific function or set of tasks and integrated into a device or product. 
1. Design and implement a basic communication protocol (packet format, length, checksums, error handling, and retransmission strategy).
2. Use an RTOS (such as FreeRTOS or Zephyr) to establish multitasking, synchronization (Semaphore, Queue, Mutex), and time management.
3. Create a userspace program + systemd service + simple network communication (Socket, MQTT, HTTP) on an Embedded Linux platform.
4. Write modular firmware/system services on an MCU or Linux platform, implementing GPIO, timers, UART, I2C, SPI, ADC, and PWM.
schedule:
Week 1 - Course Introduction
Week 2 - Embedded introduction and installation of Embeded Linux system
Week 3 - Introduction to Linux Shell and Shell Scripts 
Week 4 - Linux GPIO / gpiod / ELF / Memory Segmentation
Week 5 - UART / I2C / SPI User Mode, Device Files Concepts
Week 6 - Disk Quota and Advanced File System Management
Week 7 – Crontab, Multithreading (pthread) Experiments
Week 8 - Socket Programming (TCP/UDP) + Local Communication
Week 9 - Interim Report and Evaluation
Week 10 - Introduction to RTOS real-time operating system 
Week 11 - MQTT or HTTP Client, Basic Data Model
Week 12 - Security: User permissions, SSH keys, firewalls
Week 13 - Linux Kernel Compilation and Management 
Week 14 - Remote monitoring (simple web interface or CLI tool)
Week 15 - Linux Embedded System Special Topic Implementation
Week 16 - Linux Embedded System Special Topic Implementation
Week 17 - Final report and evaluation
Week 18 - Final report and evaluation
scorePolicy:
Mid-term assessment: 25.0%
Final assessment: 25.0%
Quiz, Assessment and report evaluation: 35.0%
Attendance rate: 15.0%
materials:
Book：Raspberry Pi Assembly Language Programming: ARM Processor Coding, Stephen Smith (Author).  Apress; 1st edition (Oct. 2019).  English, 396 pages
ISBN: 1484252861
課程對應SDGs指標: SDG4：優質教育（Quality Education）SDG9：產業創新與基礎設施（Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure）
課程是否導入AI: ● 鼓勵學生使用生成式 AI 工具（Encourage students to use generative AI tools）
remarks: SDG 9 - 工業、創新和基礎建設 (Industry,Innovation and Infrastructure)
